fields.name: kit
fields.description: The language kit declaring this alias (e.g. 'java', 'rust', 'python').

fields.name: sort_morphism_cid
fields.description: CID of the sort-morphism memento this alias attaches to (the kit's commitment of 'my-kit:Sort -> concept:Sort').

fields.name: source_aliases
fields.description: Source-text tokens in the kit's language that denote this kit-sort. For java:int → concept:Int, e.g. ['int', 'Integer', 'byte', 'Byte', 'short', 'Short', 'long', 'Long'].

fields.name: denotes_parametric_application
fields.description: When the source-token denotes a FIXED application of a parametric constructor (e.g. java's StringBuilder = Ref<String>), captures the constructor + bound args. Null for non-parametric primitives or for parametric constructors that take args at use-site (e.g. List<T>).

fields.name: parametric_arity
fields.description: When the source-token is a parametric constructor that takes args at use-site (List, Map, AtomicReference), captures the expected arity. Null for non-parametric / fixed-shorthand aliases.
